name: wormlink
description: WormLink is an encrypted P2P desktop app, compatible with WebWormhole servers, designed to reduce the trust required in remote servers.
author: Macxzew

scripts.clean: rimraf dist dist-electron out WormLink-win32-x64 WormLink-linux-x64 WormLink-darwin-x64 package-lock.json node_modules
scripts.build-win: npm run build && npx electron-packager . WormLink --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --electron-version=41.2.0 --icon=./assets/app-icon.ico && (if exist WormLink-win32-x64 (cd WormLink-win32-x64 && del chrome_100_percent.pak chrome_200_percent.pak d3dcompiler_47.dll libEGL.dll libGLESv2.dll LICENSE LICENSES.chromium.html snapshot_blob.bin version version.dll vk_swiftshader.dll vk_swiftshader_icd.json vulkan-1.dll) else echo Folder does not exist)
scripts.build-mac: npm run build && npx electron-packager . WormLink --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --electron-version=41.2.0 --icon=./assets/app-icon.icns && [ -d WormLink-darwin-x64 ] && cd WormLink-darwin-x64 && rm -f LICENSE LICENSES.chromium.html version || echo 'Folder does not exist'
scripts.build-lin: npm run build && npx electron-packager . WormLink --platform=linux --arch=x64 --electron-version=41.2.0 --icon=./assets/app-icon.png
scripts.build-all: npm run build-win && npm run build-lin && npm run build-mac
